_publications._publicationTitle: Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: systemic L-DOPA treatment (sufficient to rescue the behavioral and learning deficits) increased cAMP levels ( Fig. 3A ) and DARPP32 phosphorylation ( Fig. 3B ) in the hippocampus, but had no effect on Ras/ERK activity
details: L-DOPA treatment increased cAMP levels and DARPP32 phosphorylation in hippocampus but had no effect on Ras/ERK activity
